title: Date Secret
description: A walnut-date cake baked until just set, then layered twice with sliced bananas and pineapple chunks and finished with whipped cream. A family dessert from the recipe card collection.

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a baking dish.
Beat eggs well. Stir in sugar, flour, and baking powder until combined. Fold in chopped walnuts and dates.
Pour into the prepared dish and bake 20–25 minutes until set and lightly golden. Let cool completely.
To assemble: layer cake, sliced bananas, and pineapple chunks. Repeat layers twice. Top with whipped cream and serve.

notes:
From Darlene's handwritten recipe card -- one of the originals.

The cake base is dense and date-sweet on its own; the fruit and whipped cream layers are what make it a proper dessert. Don't skip the double layering.

Best assembled close to serving so the cake doesn't get soggy from the fruit.
